title: ACRE advice: application for a clinical study of genetically modified Neisseria lactamica (25/R50/01)
body: "This document is the advice of the Advisory Committee on Releases to the Environment (ACRE) to government on an application from the University of Southampton to carry out a clinical study of genetically modified Neisseria lactamica.    The committee advised that the risks to human health and the environment from this study are extremely low. "
